profile.name: Child's Name
profile.tooYoung: Solid foods are suitable from 4 months. Until then, breast milk or formula only.

dashboard.title: Daily Menu
dashboard.greetingBoy: Hello! Today's menu for your son {name} 👦
dashboard.greetingGirl: Hello! Today's menu for your daughter {name} 👧

recipes.okayuDesc: Gentle Japanese rice porridge with silken tofu
recipes.okayuBenefit: Easy to digest, rich in plant protein and minerals
recipes.arepasBenefit: Calcium and available energy for growth
recipes.arepasDairySub: Remove cheese — delicious without it too
recipes.galloDesc: Costa Rican rice and black beans
recipes.galloBenefit: Complete plant protein, rich in dietary fiber
recipes.nhopiDesc: African pumpkin puree with peanut butter
recipes.nhopiBenefit: Vitamin A for vision, healthy fats for brain development
recipes.nhopiPeanutSub: Use sunflower seed butter instead of peanut butter
recipes.boxtyBenefit: Complex carbohydrates, soft texture ideal for babies
recipes.dalDesc: Indian lentil soup with turmeric and cumin
recipes.koshariDesc: Lentils, pasta, rice and tomato sauce
recipes.koshariBenefit: Complete vegan meal, rich in protein and carbohydrates
recipes.paellaDesc: Spanish saffron rice with chicken and vegetables
recipes.paellaBenefit: Protein and energy, diverse colors and flavors
recipes.frikBenefit: Rich in protein and iron, soft texture suitable for toddlers
recipes.frikEggSub: Replace egg with 1 tbsp ground flaxseed + 3 tbsp water
recipes.omusiceDesc: Vegetable fried rice wrapped in a Japanese omelette
recipes.omusiceBenefit: Perfect combination of protein and carbohydrates
recipes.omusiceEggSub: Use 2 tbsp aquafaba (chickpea liquid) per egg
recipes.schnitzelBenefit: Kids' favorite, protein-rich — baked not fried
recipes.schnitzelEggSub: Dip in almond milk before coating
recipes.shakDesc: Eggs in tomato and pepper sauce
recipes.shakEggSub: Try silken tofu in the sauce instead of eggs
recipes.sabichDesc: Roasted eggplant, hard-boiled egg and tahini
recipes.sabichEggSub: Remove egg — the dish is delicious without it
recipes.hummusDesc: Homemade hummus with tahini and lemon
recipes.hummusBenefit: Calcium, protein and iron from chickpeas and tahini
recipes.hummusSesameSub: Make without tahini — add olive oil and lemon
recipes.greekBenefit: Fresh vitamins and minerals, cheese for calcium
recipes.sweetPotatoDesc: Mashed sweet potato with black beans
recipes.sweetPotatoBenefit: Vitamin A, dietary fiber, natural energy
recipes.ptitimBenefit: Excellent carbohydrate base with vitamins from vegetables
recipes.teffPorridgeBenefit: Iron-rich ancient grain, supports blood development
recipes.avocadoRiceMashDesc: Mashed soft rice with fresh avocado
recipes.avocadoRiceMashBenefit: Healthy monounsaturated fats for brain and eye development
recipes.coconutMilletPorridgeDesc: South Indian millet porridge with coconut milk
recipes.coconutMilletPorridgeBenefit: Magnesium and plant-based energy, gentle on digestion
recipes.manousheZaatarDesc: Lebanese flatbread with za'atar and labneh
recipes.manousheZaatarBenefit: Calcium from labneh, antioxidants from za'atar herbs
recipes.manousheZaatarGlutenSub: Use gluten-free flatbread or rice crackers
recipes.manousheZaatarDairySub: Replace labneh with hummus or avocado spread
recipes.tamagoyakiBenefit: Complete protein and choline for brain development
recipes.tamagoyakiEggSub: Use silken tofu slices lightly seasoned with soy sauce
recipes.msemenDesc: Moroccan layered flatbread with butter and honey
recipes.menemenDesc: Turkish scrambled eggs with tomato and pepper
recipes.menemenBenefit: Lycopene from tomatoes and quality protein from eggs
recipes.menemenEggSub: Use crumbled silken tofu sautéed in the tomato sauce
recipes.challahFrenchToastDesc: Soft Israeli challah dipped in egg and pan-fried
recipes.challahFrenchToastBenefit: Energy, protein, and calcium — a comforting first finger food
recipes.challahFrenchToastGlutenSub: Use gluten-free brioche or rice bread
recipes.challahFrenchToastEggSub: Dip in a banana-oat milk mixture instead
recipes.hareesDesc: Gulf-style slow-cooked wheat and chicken porridge
recipes.hareesBenefit: Slow-release energy from whole wheat, protein from chicken
recipes.hareesGlutenSub: Use slow-cooked rice with the same spices
recipes.creamyPolentaDesc: Smooth Italian cornmeal porridge with parmesan
recipes.creamyPolentaBenefit: Iron-fortified corn, calcium from cheese, easy to swallow
recipes.creamyPolentaDairySub: Use nutritional yeast and olive oil instead of cheese
recipes.egusiSoupDesc: Nigerian melon seed soup with leafy greens
recipes.egusiSoupBenefit: Rich in protein and healthy fats from melon seeds, iron from greens
recipes.jollofRiceDesc: West African rice cooked in spiced tomato sauce
recipes.jollofRiceBenefit: Lycopene from tomatoes, energy-dense carbohydrates for active toddlers
recipes.sopaDeFileoDesc: Mexican toasted noodle soup with tomato broth
recipes.sopaDeFileoBenefit: Comforting iron-fortified pasta with vitamins from tomato broth
recipes.sopaDeFileoGlutenSub: Use rice noodles instead of wheat fideo
recipes.fishPureeNordicDesc: Swedish-style poached white fish with mashed potato
recipes.fishPureeNordicBenefit: Omega-3 DHA for brain development, easy first fish introduction
recipes.fishPureeNordicDairySub: Use olive oil instead of butter in the mash
recipes.bacalhauPotatoDesc: Portuguese salt cod with potato and egg
recipes.bacalhauPotatoBenefit: High-quality protein from cod, iodine for thyroid development
recipes.bacalhauPotatoEggSub: Omit egg — the dish works well without it
recipes.minestroneBenefit: Wide range of vitamins from mixed vegetables, iron from beans
recipes.minestroneeGlutenSub: Use gluten-free small pasta or rice
recipes.peaSpinachPureeDesc: British-style blended peas and spinach with butter
recipes.peaSpinachPureeBenefit: Folate and iron from spinach, plant protein from peas
recipes.locroStewDesc: Argentinian hearty stew with corn, squash and beans
recipes.locroStewBenefit: Diverse plant proteins, slow-release energy from corn and squash
recipes.borschtMildDesc: Ukrainian beet soup with potato and a dollop of smetana
recipes.borschtMildBenefit: Betacyanin from beetroot supports detoxification, folate for growth
recipes.borschtMildDairySub: Use coconut cream instead of smetana
recipes.mujaddaraDesc: Lebanese lentils and rice with caramelised onion
recipes.mujaddaraBenefit: Complete plant protein, iron and fibre from lentils
recipes.lentilApplePureeDesc: Smooth red lentil puree with sweet apple
recipes.lentilApplePureeBenefit: Iron from lentils, natural sweetness from apple for early acceptance
recipes.butternutGingerPureeDesc: Silky roasted butternut squash with a hint of ginger
recipes.butternutGingerPureeBenefit: Beta-carotene for immunity and vision, ginger aids digestion
recipes.appleParsnipSoupDesc: Gentle Irish-style blended parsnip and apple soup
recipes.appleParsnipSoupBenefit: Natural sweetness encourages acceptance, folate from parsnip
recipes.broccoliPotatoMashDesc: Creamy mashed potato blended with steamed broccoli
recipes.broccoliPotatoMashBenefit: Vitamin C and sulforaphane from broccoli, energy from potato
recipes.tomKhaTofuDesc: Thai coconut milk soup with silken tofu and lemongrass
recipes.tomKhaTofuBenefit: Healthy fats from coconut milk, plant protein from tofu
recipes.tomKhaTofuSoySub: Replace tofu with finely diced cooked courgette
recipes.zucchiniRicottaMashDesc: Italian-style steamed courgette mashed with ricotta
recipes.zucchiniRicottaMashBenefit: Calcium and protein from ricotta, mild flavour ideal for evenings
recipes.zucchiniRicottaMashDairySub: Use silken tofu instead of ricotta
recipes.caldoVerdeDesc: Portuguese potato and kale soup with chourico
recipes.caldoVerdeBenefit: Vitamin K from kale, comfort carbohydrates, iron from meat
recipes.yamPeanutMashDesc: West African pounded yam with groundnut sauce
recipes.yamPeanutMashBenefit: Slow-release yam energy, healthy fats and protein from peanuts
recipes.yamPeanutMashPeanutSub: Use sunflower seed butter for the sauce
recipes.chickenLeekSoupDesc: Scottish chicken and leek broth, gently cooked
recipes.chickenLeekSoupBenefit: Lean protein from chicken, prebiotics from leek for gut health
recipes.sancochoPureeDesc: Colombian chicken and root vegetable stew, blended smooth
recipes.sancochoPureeBenefit: Diverse root vegetables provide vitamins, protein from chicken

errors.noRecipes: No suitable dishes found. Check your settings.
errors.ageRange: Age must be between 0 and 24 months
errors.weightRange: Weight must be between 1 and 30 kg
errors.heightRange: Height must be between 40 and 100 cm
